name: Soroban Swap Pool v1
reason: Audited liquidity pool deployment. Verified source code matches standard repository. Zero reports from community over 12 months.

name: Stellar Yield Yield-Aggregator
reason: Developer keys retain full administrative backdoor access. Code contains dynamic fee functions configured to rug pull assets (mint-and-drain mechanism).

name: USD Coin Impersonator
reason: Contract mimics the official Stellar USDC token name and logo but redirect calls to a non-standard transfer function that compromises signers.

name: Flash-Loan Protocol Helper
reason: Vulnerable contract containing an unchecked reentrancy vulnerability. Active exploit payload detected in live transaction history draining user collateral.

name: StellarAirdrop Claim Portal
reason: Distributes worthless claim vouchers that request extreme wallet permissions. Users are forced to execute high-gas transactions that route to private pools.

name: Decentralized Stellar Swap Phishing Portal
reason: Mimics the layout of popular wallets. Requests users sign arbitrary operations that transfer key-pair controls to attackers.
